title: Israeli Airstrikes Pound Beirut As Shelters Fill With Displaced Families | 10 News
description: Israeli airstrikes struck Beirut on Thursday night as Israel expanded its military campaign in Lebanon.  Lebanese authorities say nearly 700 people have been killed and more than 800,000 forced from their homes by the strikes.  In Beirut, volunteers and staff at a school shelter are cooking around the clock for families displaced by the attacks.  About 2,500 people are now sheltering at the campus, with numbers continuing to rise. title: Netanyahu Issues Veiled Threat To Iran’s New Supreme Leader | 10 News
description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has issued a veiled threat against Iran’s new supreme leader during his first press conference since the war began.  Netanyahu said Iran was “no longer the same” after nearly two weeks of joint US-Israeli airstrikes.  When asked about Iran’s leadership, he said he would not “issue life insurance policies” for leaders of militant groups.  Netanyahu also said he speaks daily with US President Donald Trump as the conflict continues.
